<!--
Thanks for opening a PR. A short checklist to make review fast:
-->

## What and why

<!-- One or two sentences on what this changes and why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (or: explain why not)
- [ ] `README.md` updated if HCL syntax or CLI behavior changed
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` passes locally
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes locally
- [ ] No credentials or sensitive data in the diff (check config fixtures, test DSNs, logs)

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything surprising? Trade-offs you considered? Things to pay extra attention to? -->
